hero.description: Delivering scalable, high-performance applications across logistics, e-commerce, and enterprise systems.

about.title: About Me
about.content: Web developer with over 6 years of experience delivering scalable, high-performance applications. Skilled in designing robust backends, building intuitive user interfaces, and optimizing data-driven workflows. Experienced in collaborating with cross-functional teams to transform complex requirements into reliable, business-focused solutions. Recognized for improving system efficiency, streamlining processes, and ensuring long-term maintainability of digital platforms.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
